quality.rationale: 基于局部正交基性质的张量缩并恒等式计算，逻辑直接但解答完整清晰，属纯数学结构验证

origin.question: Problem 3.22. Evaluate $\varepsilon_{\mu \nu \rho \sigma} \varepsilon^{\mu \nu \rho \sigma}$ .
origin.solution:
Solution 3.22. Evaluate this scalar in a local orthonormal frame. According to Solution 3.21, $\varepsilon_{\mu 
u ho \sigma} = -\varepsilon^{\mu 
u ho \sigma}$ so $$ \varepsilon_{\mu 
u ho \sigma} \varepsilon^{\mu 
u ho \sigma} = - \sum_{\mu 
u ho \sigma} | \varepsilon_{\mu 
u ho \sigma} |^{2} = - \sum | \varepsilon_{0 1 2 3} |^{2} $$ where the sum is over permutations of 0123. Since there are $4! = 24$ permutations, $\varepsilon_{\mu 
u ho \sigma}^{\mu 
u ho \sigma} = -24$ .
